item.title: Abiomed Releases Device Correction for Heart Pumps

item.title: Traumatic Brain Injury Tied to Dementia-Related Mortality
item.description: Traumatic brain injury, especially moderate-to-severe injury or repeated injuries, is linked to increased all-cause and dementia-related mortality, ne...

item.title: 12-Hour A&E Admission Waits Surge to New High
item.description: Record 12-hour A&E waits in England contrast with a falling NHS list, as experts question whether ‘list cleaning’ is driving the decline. Press Associ...

item.title: Factor XI Inhibitor Cuts Bleeding Risk in AF Across Ages
item.description: Patients with atrial fibrillation receiving the factor XI inhibitor abelacimab have a lower risk for bleeding than those receiving rivaroxaban, irresp...

item.title: Vaccine Trials Advance Pneumovirus Prevention
